rationale: The cited paper appears as part of a grouped citation when the authors position their work within an "emerging literature on informative cues and inference making in digital environments." The citing paper does not discuss Grewal and Stephen (2019) separately, does not use its mechanism or measures, and does not build any specific hypothesis or empirical design step directly on it. This indicates a background literature-list role rather than a distinct functional contribution to the paper's core argument.
